candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Selected exact reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct cash/cash equivalents component on the balance sheet; preferable to cash flow lines for CHE.
Could represent total cash and cash equivalents/liquid funds, and it ties to cash flow beginning/end liquid assets.

variables.notes: Preferred 'Liquid Assets' because it matches the cash flow statement's 'Liquid assets at year-end' and appears to represent total cash/liquid funds. Included 'Cash and bank balances' as secondary priority because labels may vary over time.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Selected exact reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best clean current debt line visible; financing-related and current. Excludes leases.
Candidate label for current portion of long-term debt, but all shown values are blank so likely not the active reported line.

variables.notes: Chose non-lease short-term interest-bearing liabilities as STD. Excluded 'Short-term lease liabilities' per rule. Did not include blank 'Current maturities'.

candidates.why: Most direct current taxes payable/current tax liabilities line within current liabilities section.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate was provided, but 'Tax Liabilities' is a clear balance-sheet current tax payable line and is selected confidently.

candidates.why: Best reported total for property, plant and equipment / tangible fixed assets on the balance sheet.
PPE-related asset but narrower and lease-related; not preferred for total PPE.

variables.notes: Selected the total tangible fixed assets line as the best net PPE measure.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Selected exact reported total assets line.

candidates.why: Direct net cash flow from operating activities; preferred over pre-working-capital subtotal.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow subtotal before working capital changes; less preferred than final operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Selected the final net cash flow from operating activities line, not the pre-working-capital subtotal.
